Terms governing the FOLLOW.ART platform, your  account, Nexus Card, portfolio, Gift Card, micropatronage and subscription. Review before joining.

Welcome to FOLLOW.ART - a new-generation platform where artists and curators can thrive, connect, and grow professionally. Whether you're here to learn professional representation, showcase your work, expand your network, share knowledge, or discover innovative tools for your creative journey, FOLLOW.ART is your space to make it happen.

Through the FOLLOW.ART platform, you can choose how you want to represent yourself - from a free account to enhanced subscription features. At the heart of our ecosystem is the NEXUS Card, your dynamic digital portfolio and networking tool that seamlessly connects you with opportunities and fellow creatives.

By using FOLLOW.ART, you're joining a community committed to making the art industry more accessible and creator-driven. These Terms & Conditions outline how we can work together to maintain this vibrant space, where we choose collaboration over competition. They're designed to protect both you and our community, ensuring everyone can focus on what matters most - creating, curating, connecting, and growing professionally.

Ready to begin? Let's transform how the art industry works - together. By using our platform, you're agreeing to these Terms - it's that simple.

Note: If you'd prefer not to accept these terms, we understand. You'll need to hold off on using the platform for now.

1. What We're Building Together

FOLLOW.ART is your digital home for professional representation and creative growth. We provide a platform where you can:

  • Showcase your work and content your way
  • Find and connect with fellow curators and artists
  • Increase your income through contributions from your supporters
  • Access powerful digital tools that enhance your professional representation
  • Use the NEXUS Card to expand your professional network seamlessly across the world

2. Your Journey With Us

Whether you're starting with our free features or choosing a paid subscription or add-on features, you're in control of your creative journey. Each subscription level offers different tools and possibilities to support your professional representation and connections.

3. Our Commitment to Change

The art world is evolving, and so are we. When we make important changes to these Terms, we'll let you know 30 days in advance. We'll keep you updated through email or platform notifications, ensuring you're always informed about how these changes might affect you.

4. Your Space on FOLLOW.ART

You're welcome to join if you:

  • Are an artist and/or curator 18 years old or older
  • Share authentic information about yourself
  • Keep your account secure

We value authenticity in our community. That's why we may need to restrict accounts that misrepresent themselves or engage in fraudulent activities.

Your FOLLOW.ART Name
Your creative identity matters. When joining FOLLOW.ART, you'll choose a Name that represents you while respecting our community standards and others' rights.

Choose Wisely:

  • Your Name should authentically represent you or your creative practice
  • Avoid using names of others (like artists, curators, brands, or institutions) without authorization
  • Keep it professional and appropriate for our global creative community
  • Don't select Names just to sell them later (no domain squatting)

5. Your Creative Content

When sharing your content with us, you're confirming that:

  • It's your original content or you have the rights to share it
  • It respects others' intellectual property and privacy
  • It aligns with legal requirements and professional standards

Your content deserves to be seen. When you share content on FOLLOW.ART, here's how we can help amplify your creative voice:

6. Growing Together: Plans & Payments

  • Start with a free account to explore our basic features
  • Upgrade to paid subscriptions for enhanced tools and opportunities
  • Choose when to start and stop - you're in control of your subscription
  • Subscriptions are billed upfront and auto-renew for your convenience
  • You can cancel anytime
  • Your access continues until the end of your billing period
  • FOLLOW.ART also offers a Support My Practice feature, allowing you to collect contributions from your supporters via the Nexus Card, powered by Stripe Connect.
  • By using this feature, you are solely responsible for managing any revenue received, including handling taxes, disputes, chargebacks, and any legal or financial obligations.
  • FOLLOW.ART acts only as a platform and does not process or manage payments directly. In some cases, FOLLOW.ART may collect a small commission from contributions received. All applicable fees and commission rates will be clearly communicated during the setup of this functionality and in the relevant support documentation on our website.
  • All applicable fees and terms are clearly communicated during your Stripe profile setup.
  • From time to time, FOLLOW.ART may offer promotional codes for discounts on subscription plans or features.
  • Promo codes are subject to expiration dates, usage limits, and other conditions as specified at the time of offer.
  • Promo codes are non-transferable, have no cash value, and may not be combined with other offers unless explicitly stated.
  • FOLLOW.ART may provide a referral program allowing users to earn rewards or benefits by inviting others to join the platform.
  • Participation in the referral program is subject to specific terms, including eligibility criteria and reward conditions, which will be disclosed within the referral interface or on our website.
  • FOLLOW.ART reserves the right to suspend or terminate referral rewards at its discretion if abuse, fraud, or violations of the terms are detected.

7. Community Standards

  • Be yourself - authentic profiles only
  • Share content that enriches yourself and our community
  • Engage genuinely - no automated tools or bots
  • Respect others - no harassment or spam

8. Feedback & Beta Features

Your insights help shape FOLLOW.ART! Here's how we collaborate to make our platform better:

  • We value your suggestions for improving FOLLOW.ART
  • Your feedback helps us create better tools for the creative community
  • When you share ideas with us, we can use them to enhance the platform
  • While we can't offer payment for suggestions, we deeply appreciate your input
